name: DetectedIssueExampleMedicationClass
title: Detected Issue Example Medication Class
description: Example code system illustrating medication classes.

concept.definition: Analgesics such as lidocaine. Common suffixes include -caine, common roots include -morph, -morphe, -morphic
Antacids such as omeprazole. Common suffixes include -azole, common roots include -tidine
Antibiotics such as levofloxacin. Common suffixes include -mycin, -floxacin, common roots include bacter-, vir-, -cidal
